title: KAPA HiFi HotStart PCR
description: Roche KAPA HiFi HotStart ReadyMix (2X): 25 uL high-fidelity reaction with a 98 C cycle denaturation and 60-75 C anneal.

payload.notes: Vendor: Roche / KAPA Biosystems, KAPA HiFi HotStart ReadyMix 2X (Cat. KK2601). Set up on ice (the proofreading enzyme degrades primers at room temperature). The high-salt buffer requires a 98 C cycle denaturation. Use 5 min at 95 C for the initial denaturation with >70% GC templates. Annealing: run a 60-75 C gradient; if no gradient, start at 65 C. The 65 C shown is the recommended starting point. Cycles 15-35 (use <= 25 for highest fidelity; 30-35 only for low yield/template). Extension 15 sec/cycle for targets <= 1 kb, 30-60 sec/kb for longer (max 1 min/kb). A 2-step protocol (68-75 C combined anneal/extend, 30 sec/kb) works for high-Tm primers. Source: https://rochesequencingstore.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/KAPA-HiFi-HotStart-ReadyMix-PCR-Kit-Technical-Data-Sheet_v14-22.pdf
